items.title: Eval harness for LLM regressions
items.why: What testing, eval harnesses, or guardrails reduced bugs or outage risk?
how_to_steps: Open the source: https://github.com/openai/evals
Skim for prerequisites and install commands
Apply the workflow on a small branch before team rollout
Measure cycle time or defect rate for one week
items.evidence: fewer bugs, caught regressions, or eval score
